title: Solana cluster registry — versions Rome targets
description: Tracks the upstream Solana versions on the two clusters Rome cares about (mainnet, devnet). Rome explicitly does NOT target Solana testnet — Rome's testnet rollups settle to Solana devnet. Live data lives at solana/clusters.json. Updated whenever Solana ships a new release on either cluster, ideally before Rome's own RPC nodes upgrade so we have a tested-compatible reference point.

solanaVersion.description: Upstream solana-core version reported by getVersion (e.g. 3.1.13, 4.0.0-beta.6).

rpcUrl.description: Public RPC endpoint used to capture the verifiedAt snapshot.

featureSet.description: Optional. The numeric feature-set ID returned alongside solanaVersion. Useful for catching feature-gate flips before client behavior changes.

verifiedAt.description: ISO-8601 date the snapshot was taken (YYYY-MM-DD).

romeNodeVersion.description: Optional. Solana version Rome runs on its own RPC nodes for this cluster. Track upstream + Rome side-by-side to catch drift before a coordinated upgrade — Rome ahead of upstream is fine on devnet (testing the next mainnet release); on mainnet it should match upstream once verified.

notes.description: Free-form context — coordinated rollout windows, known compatibility quirks, blockers.
